likelyCause.explanation: The webhook endpoint may have changed or the webhook subscription expired after the app update.

diagnosticSteps.check: Verify webhook subscriptions are active in Shopify admin

diagnosticSteps.expectedResult: OAuth token is valid and not expired

fixSteps: Check Shopify webhook subscriptions in Settings > Notifications
Re-register any missing or inactive webhooks
Test with a manual order to verify sync resumes
nextStepSuggestion: Run a health check on your connections.
nextStepDescription: Use Connection Health Check to verify all your integrations are healthy.
